matcher_value: $e=Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System';StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-30);Level=@(1,2,3)} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.ProviderName -match 'disk|storport|stornvme|nvme|ntfs|partmgr|iaStor|storahci|mpio' -or $_.Message -match '(?i)i/o error|timeout|timed out|transport failed|media error|reset to device|bad block|fc packet|dropped request|corrupt' }; if($e){$e | Select-Object TimeCreated,ProviderName,Id,LevelDisplayName,@{N='Message';E={($_.Message -replace '\r?\n',' ')}} | Format-Table -Wrap -Auto}else{'No I/O timeout/transport/media-like warning or error events found in the last 30 days.'}
